title: Edelweiss
description: Edelweiss melody page with letter notes and fingering-chart support for ocarina, recorder, and tin whistle players.
alignedLyrics: E- del- weiss, E- dev- weiss, ev- ery morn- ing you greet me,
Small and white, clean and bright, you look hap- ppy to meet me.
Blossom of snow may you bloom and grow, bloom and grow for- ev- er.
E- del- weiss, E- del- weiss, Bless my home- land for- ev- er!
